requirements_addressed: detect_provider() correctly classifies anthropic, openai, local-vllm, and unknown URLs
extract_token_usage() returns (0, 0) for missing usage data
measure_latency() records time even when wrapped call raises
classify_error() maps all exception types to controlled vocabulary
All functions are pure (no side effects, no imports of agent_invoker)
Unit tests cover all functions with valid, invalid, and edge case inputs

completion_promises.criterion_text: detect_provider() correctly classifies anthropic, openai, local-vllm, and unknown URLs
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented detect_provider() with case-insensitive URL matching. Tests cover: None URL, api.anthropic.com, openai URLs, localhost, vllm URLs, unknown URLs, empty strings, case-insensitive matching. All 10 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: extract_token_usage() returns (0, 0) for missing usage data
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented extract_token_usage() with getattr-based graceful handling. Returns (0, 0) for empty lists, None usage, missing attributes. Also correctly extracts valid token counts and uses last message with usage data. 7 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: measure_latency() records time even when wrapped call raises
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented measure_latency() context manager using time.perf_counter() with try/finally to ensure latency is recorded even on exceptions. LatencyResult dataclass stores ms as float. Tests verify: timing accuracy, exception recording, type correctness, very short operations. 4 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: classify_error() maps all exception types to controlled vocabulary
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented classify_error() mapping: None->None, asyncio.TimeoutError/SDKTimeoutError->timeout, RateLimitExceededError->rate_limited, ProcessError (by class name)->tool_error, all others->other. Uses class name matching for ProcessError to avoid SDK import. 8 tests pass.

Implemented check_prefix_cache() that returns (None, False) for None headers, empty headers, and headers without cache keys. Correctly parses x-vllm-prefix-cache-hit header for true/false values. 5 tests pass.

Implemented sanitise_tool_name() using a compiled regex that keeps only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots, and spaces. Tests verify stripping of ;|&$`><() individually, clean names unchanged, empty strings, and all-metacharacter strings. 9 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All functions are pure (no side effects, no imports of agent_invoker)
completion_promises.evidence: Module imports only standard library (asyncio, re, time, contextmanager, dataclass) plus guardkit.orchestrator.exceptions. Source code verified via inspect.getsource() to contain no 'agent_invoker' reference. Determinism tests verify same input produces same output. 3 purity tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all functions with valid, invalid, and edge case inputs
completion_promises.evidence: 46 tests in 8 test classes covering all 6 functions plus 3 purity checks. Test categories: valid inputs, invalid/missing inputs, edge cases (empty strings, None values, zero values), boundary conditions. 100% line and branch coverage verified by pytest-cov.
